description.value:
A battered iron lantern recovered from the Hollow Waystation on the road to Stairwatch. Its glass is cracked but intact, and the wick burns with a steady amber flame that resists wind, rain, and the unnatural cold of Fimbulwinter. The metalwork bears the stamp of a Hrafnborg lampwright — quality work from better days.

Effect: While lit, this lantern sheds bright light in a 3-square radius and dim light for an additional 3 squares. Unlike mundane lanterns, the Hollow Waystation Lantern cannot be extinguished by wind, rain, or natural cold. It burns for 8 hours on a single flask of oil.

Additionally, undead creatures that enter or start their turn in the lantern's bright light take a bane on power rolls against creatures also in the bright light. The amber flame is a faint echo of the Ever-Embers' ward — not strong enough to repel the dead, but enough to make them hesitate.

Once per encounter, the bearer can raise the lantern overhead as a maneuver and speak the Lampwright's Blessing: “Light against the long dark.” Each ally within the bright light gains temporary Stamina equal to 3 + the bearer's level, lasting until the end of the encounter.
description.director:
Found: Beat 4 — The Hollow Waystation (optional POI between montage tests). Bryn Ketilsdottir, the waystation keeper, offers it as payment for helping secure her supplies against a band of desperate refugees. Alternatively, found hanging in the Dead Waystation (Beat 8) beside the family who perished.

Gameplay Note: This lantern is critical during the Siege of Hrafnborg (Beat 9). During the marsh crossing through the siege line, the PCs cannot use normal torches without drawing the host's attention — but the Hollow Waystation Lantern's amber light blends with the Ever-Ember's fading glow, potentially granting the party light without triggering the Heat-Seeker feature on the Frost-Ghouls. The Director should reward creative use of this item during the siege breach.

project.prerequisites: A lantern of Hrafnborg make, one flask of Ever-Ember ash-oil, a lampwright's prayer inscribed on the fuel reservoir

effects.name: Hollow Waystation Lantern (Amber Ward)
effects.description: Sheds bright light (3 sq) and dim light (3 sq). Cannot be extinguished by wind, rain, or natural cold. Undead in bright light take a bane on power rolls. Once per encounter, the Lampwright's Blessing grants temporary Stamina equal to 3 + bearer's level to all allies in bright light.
